Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At An Independent Medical Examination And For An Awaerd Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
George Muhar for defendant and moving party Handlery Management & Investment LLC., Retail Brand Alliance, Inc. FKA Casual Corner, Handlery Hotels, Inc. and Casual Corner Group, Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. Defendant Handlery Management & Investment's motion to compel attendance at an independent medical examination is granted. Examination to be completed by December 30, 2006.
Plaintiff is ordered to complete the examination by Dr. Landman. The parties shall advise the Court of an appropriate date and time for the examination. The request for monetary sanctions is denied at this time. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
